result.text:
🚀 0G Labs presents: One Gravity NFT – Exclusive Whitelist for AI Alignment Node Holders! 

We’re thrilled to announce that AI Alignment Node holders will have a chance to secure a @OneGravityNFT  NFT whitelist spot through a raffle! 🎟️

To participate, simply show your interest by filling out the form below. The raffle will randomly select AI Alignment Node addresses that have registered during the interest phase.

📅 Interest Phase Details:
🗓️ Start: Monday, Feb 24, 2025, at 7:00 UTC
🗓️ End: Wednesday, Feb 27, 2025, at 7:00 UTC
🔗 Sign up here if you own an AI Alignment Node:
👉 https://t.co/hHzXvjsHGw

⚠️ Important Notes:
🔹Only AI Alignment Node holders are eligible.
🔹 Ensure you submit the form with the correct wallet address linked to your node. Non-matching wallets will be excluded.
🔹A quick wallet verification process is required, including signing a message and verifying your X and Discord accounts.

Don’t miss this opportunity to be part of One Gravity – the first NFT collection from 0G Labs! 🌌
#OneGravity #0GLabs #NFT #AI #Whitelist
